name: Scones
recipeInstructions: Mix all ingredients together until a dough forms. Form the dough into scones and bake at 350°F until lightly browned on top. Separate the mixture into smaller portions, shape them into scones, and place them in a cast iron pan to bake in the oven. Nuts and fruit are optional but highly recommended when paired with dried cranberries or apricots for an enhanced flavor experience.
